titleStmt.title: SII 27.32: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 32. (A.R. No. 32 of 1942-43.) SAṄGAMĒŚVARAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the platform of the maṇḍapa outside the western gate of the Saṅgamēśvara temple.
This inscription is dated the year Nandana, Māgha śu. 3, Thursday. The details correspond regularly to 1173 A.D., January 18.

The record states that the representatives of the four and the eight nāḍu, the seṭṭis of Kannaḍa-4000, Eḍadore-2000 etc., headed by the five hundred svāmis of Ayyāvoḷe, had a tōraṇa constructed and set up the image of Bhagavatī at Kāḍalūr in Aṁyaṇavāḍi and gathering at Mosaḷemaḍuvu alias Gaṇḍanārāyaṇapura, the chief town of Kanne300, made an endowment (the details of which are lost) to god Saṅgamēśvara, for worship and offerings and for the feeding and clothing Tatpurusha-paṇḍita, the sthānapati of the temple. It further registers a gift of one gadyāṇa by the Bīravaṇiga of Kaṇṇe-nāḍu. Ñāmōja, son of Kāvōja and younger brother of Guṁḍōja engraved the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nnakuḷōdbhava sarvvalōka hitārttha su The
hiścatramaḷa susāsanaṁ . svasti
samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī prithvī
vallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka . svasti śrī ma
tu khaḷacuriya bhujabaḷa cakravartti
rāyamurāri sōvidēvavarṣa
da naṁdana saṁvatsarada māgha suddha
tadige guruvāradalu . svasti sama
sta bhuvana vikhyāta paṁcasata vīra sa
sāna labdhānēka guṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita sa
tya sauca cāru caritra naya vinaya
vīra baṇaṁju dharmmapratipāḷakarappa śrī
madayyāvoḷeya Āynūrvva rsvāmi
gaḷa pramukha nālkuṁ nāḍa māhānā
ḍu Eṁṭunāḍa hadiṟvaruṁ kaṁnnaḍanā
lkusāyarada seṭṭiyaruṁ Eḍado
ṟirccāsirada seṭṭiyaruṁ kīrttinārā
yaṇa seṭṭi gaḍiyaṁkamalla su
ra boṁmiseṭṭi siṁgaṇa bāciseṭṭi vi
jayāditya bhīmiseṭṭi Intī mūva
ṟu bīḍina seṭṭiyaruṁ mummuridaṁ
mahānāḍa Ubhayanānādēsi
yuṁ kūḍi Aṁyaṇavāḍiya ba
ḷiyakāḍalūralu tōraṇagaṭṭi bhaga
vatiyaṁ stāpane māḍi siṁhāsa
nādhipatigaḷāgi kuḷḷirddu kaṁnnemuṁnnū
ṟa(ṟa)ra paṭṭaṇa gaṁḍanārāyaṇa pu
ra mosaḷemaḍuvina staḷamukhya vā
girddu cētiseṭṭigaṁ moḷiseṭṭigaṁ nakhara
kkaṁ nāḍigaṁ kaṁnnemuṁnnūṟaṟarastaḷada
seṭṭiyarggaṁ naḍeva nānadēsigaṁ pa
saṁga
mēsvara dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ Alli
yastānapati tatpurṣa paṁḍitara Asa
na Āścādanakaṁ koṭṭa sāsanaventeṁdaḍe
Āvi maḍuvina hoḷe vellālahoḷe si
dēsvarada hoḷe . Aḷavatūgu Eṇikeya
beleyaḍuva nālkubhaṁḍamodalāgi The

rti kulavādava
sāsirbbaru brā
hmaṇara koṁda
palavakku . svada
tta paradattaṁ vā
yōharēti vasuṁ
dhara [. ṣa*]ṣṭiṁ varṣa saha
srāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē kṛmi .
kanne nāṁḍalu Iṟi
da bīravaṇigara
lli kāṇike gadyā
ṇa Ondu Ō jā
baraṇa kāvōja
na maga guṁḍōjana
tamma nā mōja
narēka Idu
Digital edition of SII 27.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
